text:
F2E_NO_CNTCT_FAM (F2E) Absense of Personal Contact with Family/Friends CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - absence of personal contact with family/friends. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
199 F2F F2F_RECENT_LOSS (F2F) Recent Loss of Close Family Member/Friend CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - recent loss of close family member/friend. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
200 F2G F2G_NOT_ADJUST (F2G) Does Not Adjust Well Easily to
